calendar.name: GMT Operational Calendar
calendar.connectionRequirement: Use a GMT-owned Office 365 Outlook connection with delegated editor access to the shared calendar. Never fall back to a personal calendar.

flows.displayName: GMT Portal - Job Card Calendar Sync

lifecycle.new: Create an all-day event only when a planned start exists and Outlook Event ID is blank.
lifecycle.update: Update the event identified by Outlook Event ID when scheduling fields change.
lifecycle.cancelled: Mark the event cancelled or delete it only after Accounts confirms the retention policy.
lifecycle.failure: Write failed status and error text to the source record; do not discard the job card.

lifecycle.new: Create an all-day event only when a due date exists and Outlook Event ID is blank.
lifecycle.update: Update the event identified by Outlook Event ID when due date, assignee or title changes.
lifecycle.completedOrCancelled: Leave the event unchanged until Accounts approves delete-versus-retain behaviour.
lifecycle.failure: Write failed status and error text to the source record; do not discard the task.

releaseChecks: Create one non-sensitive Job Card and Task in the Developer environment.
Confirm both create exactly one event in GMT Operational Calendar.
Change the date and confirm the existing event updates rather than duplicates.
Confirm failure status is visible when the shared-calendar connection is unavailable.
Keep flows disabled until a GMT-owned connection and two flow co-owners are recorded.
